Rows: How to tell if something happened in a data set which monitors a value over time

pred_sql:
SELECT p.Title
FROM postLinks pl
JOIN posts p ON pl.PostId = p.Id
ORDER BY pl.CreationDate ASC
LIMIT 1;
question: What is the title of the post with the oldest post link?
